evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where different pricing is set per location. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that demonstrate this functionality. The linked use case mentions various needs but does not provide concrete evidence of the implementation or validation of the pricing per location, leading to an inconclusive status.
